_README: Component-scoped READ-source overrides (build-time). Key = a DataGrid component id: "<surfaceKey>" (list grid), "<surfaceKey>::<area>" (family grid), or "<surfaceKey>#<field>" (FK picker). Value = { dataSourceType: "table"|"view"|"internalUrlPath"|"externalUrlPath", dataSourceValue?, select?, columns?, filter? (Sequelize-style), details? (forwarded for internalUrlPath), processing? ("backend"|"frontend"), valueKey?/labelKey? (picker) }. ExternalUrlPath is accepted but the gateway does not implement it yet (reads will fail until it does). The generators bake the effective binding into the artifacts; the BFF routes read it. Re-run the builder after editing.
